---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, command, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What's the use case?
Describe the problem you're trying to solve. Who benefits, and how often?

## Proposed solution
A new skill / agent / command? An improvement to an existing one?
Sketch the trigger phrases or invocation pattern users would use.

## Example
```
> "audit my Shopify product pages for AEO"
→ produces …
```

## Alternatives considered
What workarounds exist today? What's missing?

## Akii platform overlap
Does this belong in the free plugin or on the Akii platform? (We use this to decide scope.)

## Anything else
Links, references, prior art, etc.

---

> Not a feature ask? Use [Discussions](https://github.com/akii-technologies-ltd/akii-seo-ai-search-optimizer/discussions) for questions, how-to, and general chat.
